true_desc_levels.1: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to decrease the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to decrease the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks 2 enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Earth</color>, this attack cannot miss, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and additionally inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks 2 enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Earth</color>, this attack cannot miss, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and additionally inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks 2 enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Earth</color>, this attack cannot miss, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and additionally inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks 2 enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>2</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Earth</color>, this attack cannot miss, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and additionally inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks 2 enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>2</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Earth</color>, this attack cannot miss, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and additionally inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵2体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除し、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n対象が地属性の場合、ミスが発生せず、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、追加で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵2体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除し、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n対象が地属性の場合、ミスが発生せず、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、追加で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적 2인을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.\n대상이 지속성이라면 빗나감이 발생하지 않으며 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시키고 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.

true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적 2인을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.\n대상이 지속성이라면 빗나감이 발생하지 않으며 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시키고 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击2名敌人。\n以<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的概率解除目标<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>，并附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>。\n若目标为土属性，则不发生<color=#28d9ed>闪避</color>，使<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>，并追加附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>。

SKT_BURST_1.effect: Change to Single Target Attack\nDMG greatly increases\nOwn Barrier +1 turn (scales with own Max Health)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_jp: 単体攻撃に変更\nダメージ大幅UP\n自分シールド+1ターン（自分の最大HP比例）
SKT_BURST_1.effect_kr: 단일 공격으로 변경\n피해량 대폭 증가\n자신 실드 +1턴 (자신 최대 체력 비례)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 变更为单体攻击\n伤害量大幅提升\n自身护盾+1回合（按自身最大生命值计算）

SKT_BURST_2.effect_jp: ダメージUP\n対象火傷+2ターン
SKT_BURST_2.effect_zh: 伤害提升\n目标烧伤+2回合

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Changes to Enhanced Skill\nRemoves Buffs ▶ Steals Buff
SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 強化攻撃に変更\n強化効果を解除 ▶ 強化効果を奪う
SKT_BURST_3.effect_kr: 강화 공격으로 교체\n강화 해제 ▶ 강화 효과 강탈
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 替换为强化攻击\n强化解除 ▶ 夺取强化效果

true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to decrease all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
Additionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> and decreases the Priority of the enemy with the highest Attack by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

If the target is Earth type, Miss will not occur.
true_desc_levels.2:
Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to decrease all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
Additionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> and decreases the Priority of the enemy with the highest Attack by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

If the target is Earth type, Miss will not occur.
true_desc_levels.3:
Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
Additionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> and decreases the Priority of the enemy with the highest Attack by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

If the target is Earth type, Miss will not occur.

Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
Additionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> and decreases the Priority of the enemy with the highest Attack by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

If the target is Earth type, Miss will not occur.
true_desc_levels.5:
Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color>.
Additionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> and decreases the Priority of the enemy with the highest Attack by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

If the target is Earth type, Miss will not occur.
true_desc_levels.1_jp:
敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>をDOWNさせる。
さらに<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>回復不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、攻撃力が最も高い敵の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>DOWNさせる。

対象が地属性の場合、ミスが発生しない。

또한 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>회복 불가</color>를 부여하고 공격력이 가장 높은 적의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 감소시킵니다.

true_desc_levels.2_zh: 使用<color=#28d9ed>死刑宣判</color>时，自身<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>在<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>内提升，并获得<color=#28d9ed>额外回合</color>。

2: Gain an Extra Turn when Death Sentence is used
2_jp: 【死刑宣告】使用時、追加ターン獲得
2_kr: 사형 선고 사용 시 추가 턴 획득
2_zh: 使用死刑宣判时获得额外回合
